parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
={{
[
  {
    role: "user",
    content: `Extract information ONLY from the CV text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact structure:

{
  "name": "",
  "email": "",
  "phone": "",
  "skills": [],
  "education": [],
  "summary": "",
  "profileTitle": ""
}

Strict extraction rules:
- Use only the CV text provided.
- Do not invent data.
- Return ONLY JSON.
- profileTitle must be chosen from this controlled list exactly:
  "Data Scientist",
  "Data Analyst",
  "Ing?nieur IA",
  "Ing?nieur Cloud / DevOps",
  "D?veloppeur Frontend",
  "D?veloppeur Backend",
  "Designer UX/UI",
  "Designer graphique",
  "Charg? de communication",
  "Assistant Finance",
  "Assistant RH",
  "Profil non class?".
- Use "Data Scientist" for Data Scientist, Senior Data Scientist, Scientific Data, Scientifique de donn?es, Scientifique des donn?es, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Pandas, TensorFlow, PyTorch.
- Use "Designer graphique" for Graphiste, graphisme, conception visuelle, direction artistique, identit? visuelle, branding, Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, affiches or print design.
- Use "Designer UX/UI" only when the CV mentions interface design, UX, UI, Figma, wireframes, prototypes or design systems.
- Use "Charg? de communication" for communication, marketing digital, community management, social media, r?seaux sociaux, cr?ation de contenu or campaigns.
- Use "Profil non class?" only when no class is supported by extracted CV evidence.

CV file:
${$json.file_name}

CV TEXT:
${$json.cv_short || $json.extracted_text}`
  }
]
}}

nodes.name: Append row in sheet
nodes.notes: Configure a Google Sheets credential after importing. This node is continueOnFail so local analysis can still return a result if Sheets is not configured.

nodes.name: Send a text message
nodes.notes: Disabled for local setup until Telegram credentials are created in this n8n instance. Re-enable after selecting a valid Telegram credential.
